forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning frost in the north. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Hawker in the morning. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost in the south. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
